name: Gum-Gum Dragon Fire Pistol Twister Star

issues.description: Missing required condition: LeaderHasType with type ODYSSEY. Effect should only trigger if Leader has {ODYSSEY} type.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. Must specify: look at top 5 cards, filter for up to 2 ODYSSEY Character cards only, reveal them, add to hand, then place rest at bottom of deck in any order. Current filter 'Any' is incorrect.
Second effect (Trigger with Rest action) is completely unrelated to card text. No mention of resting opponent characters in official text. This effect should be removed entirely.
